case_title: JESSE C. RALPH ESQ VS. DOMITILA GUTIERREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JESSE C. RALPH. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DOMITILA GUTIERREZ. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RALPH ESQ, JESSE C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, DOMITILA $584.10 PRINCIPAL, $204.17 INTEREST, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $878.27 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.
